GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,1/2,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM2+  GM1-  GM2-  GM3  GM4  GM5  GM6  (R)E1  (R)E2  (S)C1+  (S)C2+  (S)C1-  (S)C2-  (S)C3  (S)C4  (S)C5  (S)C6  (T)D1  (T)D2  (U)A1  (U)A2  (X)Y1+  (X)Y2+  (X)Y1-  (X)Y2-  (X)Y3  (X)Y4  (X)Y5  (X)Y6  (Y)Z1+  (Y)Z2+  (Y)Z1-  (Y)Z2-  (Y)Z3  (Y)Z4  (Y)Z5  (Y)Z6  (Z)B1  (Z)B2
